The '''CorSec Database H-Z''' is the second part of the [[in-universe]] ''[[CorSec Database]]'' for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' gamers. It was published on [[June 16]], [[2006]] on the ''Star Wars Galaxies'' official website.

==Content==
The database accounts for the following non-player characters and organizations:

*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]
*[[Janta]]
*[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]
*[[Kobola Miners]]
*[[Kunga]]
*Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]
*[[Lost Aqualish]]
*[[Maulers]]
*[[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] and the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]
*[[Meatlumps]]
*[[Mummers]]
*[[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]
*[[Nym/Legends|Nym]]
*[[Cult of Lord Nyax|Lord Nyax Cult]]
*[[Rori Spice Mining Collective]]
*[[Sanyassan Marauders]]
*[[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]]
*[[Sennex]]
*[[Singing Mountain Clan]]
*[[Skaak Tippers]]
*[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]]

The database is a continuation of [[CorSec Database A-G|the first part]], which accounts for A-G.

==In-universe perspective==
Like the first part of the database, CorSec Database H-Z is written from an in-universe perspective, but unlike the first part, the second part does not have any introductory or exit text.
